method: Para cada linha risk=high: pt-BR -> EN, comparar, confirmar SENTIDO, voz, callbacks e o gancho de memoria/foreshadow (manter implicito). Divergencia -> revisar.

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.source: It sounds like she's saying "thwap, thwap," but it's
entries.target: Parece que ela ta dizendo "pa, pa", mas e
entries.note: BT: 'It sounds like she's saying "thwap, thwap," but it's [hard to make out].' CALLBACK: 'thwap'->'pa' ecoa os SFX do banho (11_10). Coerencia confirmada; a Kuon revive o trauma de espiar.

entries.speaker: Kuon
entries.source: Ah, ah, no touching. It'll be uncomfortable, but its
entries.target: Ah, ah, sem tocar. Vai ser incomodo, mas a
entries.note: BT: 'Ah, ah, no touching. It'll be uncomfortable, but [its effectiveness is second to none]!' Voz doce-sadica da Kuon (impede o alivio com sorriso) preservada.

entries.speaker: Kuon
entries.source: I picked up quite a burden out there, didn't I...?
entries.target: Acabei pegando um belo de um fardo por ai, ne...?
entries.note: BT: 'I really picked up quite a burden out there, didn't I...?' 'burden'=Haku; resignacao AFETUOSA (nao queixa). Carinho disfarcado preservado.

entries.speaker: Kuon
entries.target: Mas suponho que isso seja... o meu...
entries.note: BT: 'But I suppose that's... my...' Foreshadow do senso de dever/responsabilidade da Kuon. Fala SUSPENSA preservada (nao completar - o mistério e o ponto).

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.note: BT: 'What... is this music?' Gancho de memoria/identidade (sonho). Tom onirico/suave preservado; misterio mantido.

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.source: It's... soft. And a little nostalgic...
entries.target: E... suave. E um pouco nostalgica...
entries.note: BT: 'It's... soft. And a little nostalgic...' A nostalgia aponta pro passado esquecido do Haku - delicadeza preservada, sem explicitar.

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.source: Where have I... heard it before? I feel like I've...
entries.target: Onde eu... ja ouvi isso? Sinto que eu ja...
entries.note: BT: 'Where have I... heard it before? I feel like I've...' Clímax do gancho: fecha o cap. 11 no mistério da identidade do Haku. Busca incompleta preservada.
